page_metadata.biotools__summary: CoCAS is a standalone Chromatin immunoprecipitation microarray (ChIP-on-chip) analysis application. It has been designed to be used primarily on Agilent microarrays scanned with an Agilent scanner.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CoCAS is a standalone Chromatin immunoprecipitation microarray (ChIP-on-chip) analysis application. It has been designed to be used primarily on Agilent microarrays scanned with an Agilent scanner.
